Fluent assertions for exceptions.
ThrowingCallable - Interface in com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck
A callable that may throw any Throwable.
throwsA(Class<? extends Throwable>) - Method in class com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.ExecutionCheck
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
Use ExecutionCheck.throwsInstanceOf(Class) instead.
throwsExactly(Class<? extends Throwable>) - Method in class com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.ExecutionCheck
Asserts that the code block throws an exception whose class is exactly the given type (not a subclass).
throwsInstanceOf(Class<? extends Throwable>) - Method in class com.yanimetaxas.realitycheck.ExecutionCheck
Asserts that the code block throws an exception that is an instance of the given type (including subclasses).
